content: Pivot: Gemini splits outfits, rembg cleans each crop into semantic cutout. SegFormer disabled (OOM in pod).
Config: rembg model=u2netp (4.7MB), AUTO_MATTE_CROPS=true, USE_LOCAL_CLOTHING_PARSER=false (defaults safe for pod limits)
clothing_parser.py: local SegFormer gated behind flag; crop_with_mask utility preserved for future self-hosted inference-server
garment_vision.py: _crop_all auto-pipes each Gemini bbox crop through rembg matte_crop → PNG cutouts instead of bbox JPEGs
Smoke-test rembg u2netp end-to-end (cold 4.8s, warm 0.7s, opaque 25%, no OOM)
Live-tested /analyze + /clean-background with user's real outfit (5 items, 5 PNG cutouts, applied=True, cos=0.996)
Cleaned up 1GB of unused birefnet weights; requirements.txt refreshed
